DefaultLogLevel.description: The log level for a log message. The log levels can be disabled, or set to ERROR to display less verbose logs containing only error information, or to INFO for more detailed logs.

WirelessGatewayLogOptions.description: The list of wireless gateway log options.

WirelessDeviceLogOptions.description: The list of wireless device log options.

FuotaTaskLogOptions.description: The list of FUOTA task log options.

SummaryMetric.description: The configuration status of the AWS account for summary metric aggregation.

SummaryMetricQueryResults.description: The list of summary metrics that were retrieved.

GeoJsonPayload.description: The position information of the resource, displayed as a JSON payload. The payload is of type blob and uses the GeoJSON format, which a format that's used to encode geographic data structures. A sample payload contains the timestamp information, the WGS84 coordinates of the location, and the accuracy and confidence level. For more information and examples, see Resolve device location (console).

ServerTrust.description: The Root CA of the server trust certificate.

NextToken.description: The token to use to get the next set of results, or null if there are no additional results.
The token to use to get the next set of results, or null if there are no additional results.
To retrieve the next set of results, the nextToken value from a previous response; otherwise null to receive the first set of results.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the resource.

Expression.description: The rule name or topic rule to send messages to.

RoleArn.description: The ARN of the IAM Role that authorizes the destination.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the resource.

Sidewalk.description: Information about the Sidewalk parameters in the device profile.

LoRaWAN.description: The LoRaWAN information returned from getting a FUOTA task.

FirmwareUpdateImage.description: The S3 URI points to a firmware update image that is to be used with a FUOTA task.

FirmwareUpdateRole.description: The firmware update role that is to be used with a FUOTA task.

RedundancyPercent.description: The percentage of the added fragments that are redundant. For example, if the size of the firmware image file is 100 bytes and the fragment size is 10 bytes, with RedundancyPercent set to 50(%), the final number of encoded fragments is (100 / 10) + (100 / 10 * 50%) = 15.

FragmentSizeBytes.description: The size of each fragment in bytes. This parameter is supported only for FUOTA tasks with multicast groups.

FragmentIntervalMS.description:
The interval for sending fragments in milliseconds, rounded to the nearest second.

This interval only determines the timing for when the Cloud sends down the fragments to yor device. There can be a delay for when your device will receive these fragments. This delay depends on the device's class and the communication delay with the cloud.

Descriptor.description: The descriptor is the metadata about the file that is transferred to the device using FUOTA, such as the software version. It is a binary field encoded in base64.

LoRaWAN.description: The LoRaWAN information that is to be returned from getting multicast group information.
The LoRaWAN information used with the multicast session.

TraceContent.description: Trace content for your wireless devices, gateways, and multicast groups.

WirelessDevices.description: List of wireless device resources that have been added to the network analyzer configuration.

WirelessGateways.description: List of wireless gateway resources that have been added to the network analyzer configuration.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the new resource.

MulticastGroups.description: List of multicast group resources that have been added to the network analyzer configuration.

AccountLinked.description: Whether the partner account is linked to the AWS account.

Accuracy.description: The accuracy of the estimated position in meters. An empty value indicates that no position data is available. A value of ‘0.0’ value indicates that position data is available. This data corresponds to the position information that you specified instead of the position computed by solver.

SolverType.description: The type of solver used to identify the position of the resource.

Timestamp.description: The timestamp at which the device's position was determined.

Solvers.description: The wrapper for the solver configuration details object.

Destination.description: The position data destination that describes the AWS IoT rule that processes the device's position data for use by AWS IoT Core for LoRaWAN.

DeviceRegistrationState.description: Event configuration for the device registration state event.

ConnectionStatus.description: Event configuration for the connection status event.

MessageDeliveryStatus.description: Event configuration for the message delivery status event.

LogLevel.description: The log level for a log message. The log levels can be disabled, or set to ERROR to display less verbose logs containing only error information, or to INFO for more detailed logs.

GeoJsonPayload.description: The position information of the resource, displayed as a JSON payload. The payload uses the GeoJSON format, which a format that's used to encode geographic data structures. For more information, see GeoJSON.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the resource.

DestinationName.description: The name of the destination to which the device is assigned.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the resource.

ThingName.description: The name of the thing associated with the wireless device. The value is empty if a thing isn't associated with the device.

ThingArn.description: The ARN of the thing associated with the wireless device.

Positioning.description: The integration status of the Device Location feature for LoRaWAN and Sidewalk devices.

Id.description: The identifier of the import task for which information is retrieved.

Arn.description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) of the import task.

DestinationName.description: The name of the destination that's assigned to the wireless devices in the import task.

Positioning.description: The integration status of the Device Location feature for LoRaWAN and Sidewalk devices.

Sidewalk.description: The Sidewalk-related information about an import task.

CreationTime.description: The time at which the import task was created.

StatusReason.description: The reason for the provided status information, such as a validation error that causes the import task to fail.

InitializedImportedDeviceCount.description: The number of devices in the import task that are waiting for the control log to start processing.

PendingImportedDeviceCount.description: The number of devices in the import task that are waiting in the import task queue to be onboarded.

OnboardedImportedDeviceCount.description: The number of devices in the import task that have been onboarded to the import task.

FailedImportedDeviceCount.description: The number of devices in the import task that failed to onboard to the import task.

LastUplinkReceivedAt.description:
The date and time when the most recent uplink was received.

This value is only valid for 3 months.

IotCertificateId.description: The ID of the certificate associated with the wireless gateway.

LoRaWANNetworkServerCertificateId.description: The ID of the certificate that is associated with the wireless gateway and used for the LoRaWANNetworkServer endpoint.

The date and time when the most recent uplink was received.

This value is only valid for 3 months.

ConnectionStatus.description: The connection status of the wireless gateway.

TaskCreatedAt.description: The date and time when the task was created.

AutoCreateTasks.description: Whether to automatically create tasks using this task definition for all gateways with the specified current version. If false, the task must me created by calling CreateWirelessGatewayTask.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the resource.

NextToken.description: The token to use to get the next set of results, or null if there are no additional results.

DestinationName.description: The name of the Sidewalk destination that describes the IoT rule to route messages received from devices in an import task that are onboarded to AWS IoT Wireless.

Positioning.description: The integration status of the Device Location feature for Sidewalk devices.

Sidewalk.description: The Sidewalk object containing Sidewalk-related device information.

ImportedWirelessDeviceList.description: List of wireless devices in an import task and their onboarding status.
